MacKenzie","Type":"Individual"},"MoveInCustomer":{"Id":"CUSTOMER014","Name":"Test payment -watre","Sequence":1100,"Ordered":0,"Completed":1,"ScheduledDateTime":"1900-01-01T00:00:00","EmployeeId":"","EquipmentId":"","CompletedDate":"1997-07-15T16:46:00"},{"Id":"TASK001","Description":"Meter
